title: French Fish Rillettes
description: A French-inspired appetizer made with delicate fish rillettes, perfect for a light and flavorful bite. Serve with crackers or toast points for a sophisticated snack.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the fish on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the fish from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Flake the fish into a medium bowl using a fork.
Add the softened butter, lemon juice, parsley, salt, and black pepper to the bowl with the fish.
Mix until the rillettes are smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the rillettes to a serving dish and garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with sliced French baguette rounds for a delicious and elegant snack.
